calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Terminating The Trust Or, In The Alternative, Approving Modification Of Trust Terms.
Off Calendar Jan-08-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Phillip Goldberg for petitioner David Willett.

The Court asked if Mr. Goldberg knew wat position the Attorney General was taking in regards to the petition to terminate the trust. Mr. Goldberg stated that he had not received any response from the Attorney General's office. The stated that he had nothing to add to the submission before the Court. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not reported).
